Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I was hoping to go for another run after rehydrating...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I believe you've done enough physical activity for one day. Any more, and you'll hurt yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Fine. So, {f 4 1}, were there any subjects you needed help with?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Nothing beats using them in practice problems. Are you concerned about getting bored and losing focus?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}In that case, try a quick workout between problems. The brain perks up once you get the circulation flowing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Not to mention, looking forward to your next workout is a great way to stay motivated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The most basic method is writing them over and over again... But I get that's a tough way to stay motivated.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That's why I reward myself with workout reps based on the number of new kanji I've learned.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}The more you study, the stronger you'll get. Pretty motivating, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I increase the number of reps in my workout by the number of new words I've committed to memory.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}The more you learn, the further you can push your limits. Killing two birds with one stone, as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}In any case, I advise having a good workout ready to treat yourself with after a study session.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}It all comes down to making it a regular habit. Just a little each day really adds up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I wasn't going to say anything, but... Akihiko, working out isn't normally a "reward" for most people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}On top of that, what good does it do to preach about long-term habits mere days before the exam?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Hm, I guess you have a point... In that case, how would you recommend cramming for it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's not my usual style, but I would focus on memorizing material that is likely to be tested.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}If you give it your all, it shouldn't be too difficult. Easier than facing the enemy wholly unprepared, at least.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Well, we can talk all night, but doing is where the magic happens. Here, let me give you some practice problems.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of them continued[n]giving me rigorous advice...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}You catch on quick, {f 4 1}. You immediately took what you learned and put it into practice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}All you need now is some strength training and you'll be unstoppable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Once the exams are over, why don't we dive into Tartarus for a bit and get some workouts in?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}You never change... I'll need to continue keeping an eye on you to make sure you don't overdo it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Heh. The more you study and the more you train, the better results you'll get.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I look forward to seeing what you'll accomplish from here on, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Let's call it here for today. I want to get some stretches in before heading to bed.[n]{f 1 1}
